aiStudio.generateImagesTitle: Generate stunning images for your post
aiStudio.generateImagesDescription: Describe the image you want to generate. You can also use the dropdowns to configure the image style, aspect ratio and number of images. You can describe the text you want to see in the image and it will generate it accurately.
aiStudio.generateCaptionsTitle: Generate engaging captions for your post
aiStudio.generateCaptionsDescription: Describe the caption you want to generate. You can also use the dropdowns to configure the caption style, tone and platform. Our AI will generate 10 variations of the caption and you can choose the best one.
aiStudio.topicPlaceholder: Enter a topic or idea for your post
